name: gopeed-extention-huggingface
author: zayn
title: Huggingface下载
description:
支持Huggingface模型、数据集的文件夹解析下载, 可自由替换 Huggingface下载地址
使用方法请看主页

settings.name: cookie
settings.title: Huggingface Cookie
settings.description: Some Huggingface models require login to download, you can paste your cookie here

settings.name: customEndpoints
settings.title: Custom Endpoints
settings.description: Add custom hf-mirror-compatible endpoints to trigger parsing, separate multiple entries with semicolons (;), e.g. mymirror.example.com;another.mirror.org

settings.name: repoMode
settings.title: Repo Shorthand Mode
settings.description: Enable repo: shorthand input. Format: repo:[user/repo]<;endpoint>, e.g. repo:unsloth/DeepSeek-R1-GGUF or repo:datasets/open-thoughts/OpenThoughts-114k;cdn.hf-mirror.com. Default endpoint is hf-mirror.com when none is specified.
